title: Super Secret Settings: Restored
description: Restores Minecraft's Super Secret Settings, which were removed in the 1.9 update.
body:
Super Secret Settings: Restored was created to bring back some of my personal nostalgia to Minecraft. This mod includes every effect that Super Secret Settings originally had and includes two more - the "creeper" effect and the "spider" effect, which are usually activated when spectating the mobs with the same name. 

Ports to different mod loaders/versions are something I would like to do but are not planned immediately. I would rather focus on feature updates, like custom effects and compatibility with other mods. 

# FAQ:
## Is this compatible with Sodium/Iris/Lithium?
**Within development, I tested with Sodium/Iris and Complementary Shaders, which were compatible. I do not know if other shaders will work, however as long as they do not mess with Minecraft's PostEffect system, they should be compatible.**

## Will there be ports to Forge/Fabric/Quilt or to different versions?
**Like stated above, it is something I would like to do, but is not a main focus. Feature updates will come first.**
